mapper.sql: id, word, category, level, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_sensitive_word WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT word FROM blog_sensitive_word WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT word FROM blog_sensitive_word WHERE level = #{level} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_sensitive_word (id, word, category, level, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{word}, #{category}, #{level}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE word = VALUES(word), category = VALUES(category), level = VALUES(level), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE blog_sensitive_word
word = #{word}, category = #{category}, level = #{level}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_sensitive_word SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
